products.title: Garage Fob Sun Visor Clip
products.description: Snap-fit sun visor clip that securely holds your garage fob, eliminating the need to carry it loose or in your car. Clips directly onto your sun visor for easy access, just like a traditional garage opener. Originally designed for The Bakerfield residents, but custom versions available for any building or fob style.
products.imageAlt: 3D printed garage fob sun visor clip

products.title: Sink Drip Tray
products.description: Perfect drainage tray specially designed for The Bakerfield sinks. Keeps counters clean and dry with built-in drainage channels.

portfolio.title: Floating Xbox Holder
portfolio.description: Under-shelf mount designed to hold an Xbox One console. Saves space and keeps your setup clean. Custom variants available for other console models or even controller holders.

portfolio.title: Microphone Holder
portfolio.description: Holder designed for wireless lav mics. In this example, it perfectly fits a Hollyland mic that slips right in. Custom sizes available for other mic models.

portfolio.title: Custom Easter Eggs
portfolio.description: Custom 3D printed Easter eggs showcasing festive flexibility. Each egg is uniquely designed — proof that we can bring a creative, seasonal touch to any project. Perfect for decorations, gifts, or holiday events.

portfolio.title: Water Bottle Cap (Stanley Size)
portfolio.description: Custom 3D printed replacement cap designed to fit Stanley-size bottles. Durable and leak-resistant design.

portfolio.title: Ridgeline Dash Storage Tray
portfolio.description: Custom-fit storage tray designed for the Honda Ridgeline dashboard storage hole. Perfectly organizes small items and accessories in your dash compartment.
portfolio.imageAlt: Custom 3D printed Ridgeline dash storage tray

portfolio.title: Medicine Cabinet Organizer
portfolio.description: Space-saving cabinet organizer with adjustable shelves and compartments. Perfect for bathroom or kitchen storage needs.

portfolio.title: Monitor MagSafe Mount
portfolio.description: Magnetic mounting solution for attaching your phone to your monitor. Clean design integrates seamlessly with any workspace.

portfolio.title: Utility Clip
portfolio.description: Example of a custom repair solution. This headband lamp clip was designed to replace a client's broken original piece. Now it works perfectly and saved them from buying a whole new headband lamp strap.
